title: OSCORE unprotect_request: SECURITY comment accuracy
description: In rust/lichen-node/src/secure.rs, a SECURITY comment was added explaining why unprotect_request works for responses. The comment states 'OSCORE uses symmetric AEAD encryption. The function decrypts using the recipient_key, which matches the responder's sender_key.' This is correct for the happy path, but verify that key derivation actually produces matching keys on both sides (initiator recipient_key == responder sender_key). RFC 8613 Section 3.2 confirms this but worth double-checking the implementation.
close_reason: OSCORE key derivation verified correct per RFC 8613 Section 3.2 - initiator recipient_key equals responder sender_key
